title: Octopuses Can Edit Their Own RNA
description: Explain RNA editing (A-to-I) in cephalopods: extensive recoding of neural transcripts. Cite cephalopod RNA-editing research (e.g., Rosenthal / Liscovitch-Brauer line of work in Nature/Cell-adjacent literature). Clarify this is RNA editing, not rewriting DNA. Mark evolutionary trade-offs carefully; no sci-fi overclaims.
